ip_outcome_note: Card name is 'Towa' — her canonical name. Slender female figure with long white hair in a red and white form-fitting outfit against dark/red energy matches Towa's published design exactly (Dragon Ball Wiki: long white hair, red bodysuit, Demon Realm villain). Card name is explicit identity; visual signature confirms.

trivia_bullets.text: Towa is a demon scientist from the Demon Realm and younger sister of Demon King Dabura. Her goal across Dragon Ball Online and the Xenoverse series is to gather energy from powerful warriors across time to break the seal on the Demon Realm. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Towa, via WebSearch]
sources: Dragon Ball Wiki: Towa, via WebSearch

trivia_bullets.text: Towa was originally conceived for Dragon Ball Online (the 2010 Korean MMORPG) and carried into Xenoverse and Xenoverse 2 as a primary antagonist. Her partner Mira was confirmed as designed by Akira Toriyama, and Towa's design follows the same Toriyama-supervised pipeline. She is the only named female villain in the Xenoverse main cast. [CBR: 10 Things About Towa, via WebSearch; CBR: Dragon Ball DAIMA Towa article, via WebSearch]
sources: CBR: 10 Things About Towa, via WebSearch
CBR: Dragon Ball DAIMA article, via WebSearch

trivia_bullets.text: BT3-115 is a Common card in Cross Worlds. In the BT3 set, Towa and Mira cards (BT3-115, BT3-116) appear as a thematic pair two slots apart — a design pattern the set uses to signal narrative partnerships in the Time Breaker faction. [WebSearch: DBS cardgame BT3 card list]

related_cards.name: Power Aura Mira
related_cards.note: Towa's co-antagonist and creation; appears two cards after Towa at BT3-116 in the same set

related_cards.name: Dark Plot
related_cards.note: Event card depicting the Time Breaker conspiracy Towa architects

related_cards.name: Encroaching Threat Masked Saiyan
related_cards.note: Bardock brainwashed by Towa — her most iconic controlled weapon

related_cards.name: Supreme Kai of Time, World's Protector
related_cards.note: Chronoa — Towa's principal heroic adversary in the Xenoverse arc
